content:
{
  "mode": "method",
  "tests": [
    {
      "name": "count_puzzle_pieces_basic",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}, {"id": 4}, {"id": 5}]],
      "output": 5,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates counting of a standard set of 5 puzzle pieces."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_puzzle_pieces_empty",
      "input": [[]],
      "output": 0,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests counting when no pieces are present."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_puzzle_pieces_duplicates",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}]],
      "output": 4,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Checks counting with duplicate pieces."
    },
    {
      "name": "count_puzzle_pieces_large_set",
      "input": [[{"id": i} for i in range(1000)]],
      "output": 1000,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates counting of a large set of 1000 pieces."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_specific_piece_found",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 2}, {"id": 3}], 2],
      "output": {"id": 2},
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests finding a specific piece that exists."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_specific_piece_not_found",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}, {"id": 3}], 2],
      "output": null,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests finding a specific piece that does not exist."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_specific_piece_edge_case",
      "input": [[{"id": 1}], 1],
      "output": {"id": 1},
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Validates finding a piece when only one piece is present."
    },
    {
      "name": "find_specific_piece_empty_set",
      "input": [[], 1],
      "output": null,
      "args": [],
      "kwargs": {},
      "notes": "Tests finding a specific piece in an empty set."
    }
  ],
  "assumptions": "The input is a list of puzzle pieces represented as objects with unique IDs.",
  "notes": "Ensure that the methods handle both counting and finding pieces efficiently."
}
